results.answer: The molecular formula of aspirin (PubChem CID 2244) is C9H8O4.

trace.code:
sparql_used = """PREFIX sio: <http://semanticscience.org/resource/>
SELECT ?formula WHERE {
  <http://rdf.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pubchem/compound/CID2244> sio:SIO_000008 ?attr .
  ?attr a sio:CHEMINF_000335 ; sio:SIO_000300 ?formula .
} LIMIT 5"""

answer = "The molecular formula of aspirin (PubChem CID 2244) is C9H8O4."
sources = ["https://qlever.cs.uni-freiburg.de/api/pubchem", "http://rdf.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pubchem/compound/CID2244"]
